Extension to use digital certificates within webpages

WebPKI is web based component that supports documents digital signing, signature verification and document encryption. 
This product is developed to enable browser signing of documents with user’s digital certificates and it is supported by web browsers, without the need of Java.  

WebPKI offers the following advantages:
  
 -Simple digital signing of documents from a web browser with user’s digital certificates,
  which provides proof of the signer’s identity and document integrity
   -Enables document signing using criptographic devices.
   -Enables detection and verification of existing digital signatures on PDF files
   -Easy integration of signing component into existing web applications
   -Easy configuration of the component to set up trusted issuers, or list of approved signers, or uniquely allowed certificate.

Send PDF links directly to your favorite PDF viewer like Adobe Acrobat Reader

The "Open in PDF viewer" extension opens PDF files directly in your favorite external PDF viewer application. To use the extension, right-click on a PDF link and select the "Open in PDF viewer" item. The extension downloads the PDF file in your default downloads directory and then executes the external command to open the downloaded file with the default PDF viewer (e.g. Adobe Acrobat Reader or FoxIt PDF reader).

Note that to execute an OS-level command, you need to install a native client. Native client installation guide appears on the first usage.

Features:
1. Open PDF files from right-click context menu
2. Transfer already opened PDF files to the external PDF viewer by pressing the browser's action button
3. Detect PDF links and open them with left-click
4. Open the external PDF viewer with a user-defined delay
5. Supports most common PDF viewers

Change Logs:
0.1.1:
It is now possible to define left-click open in default PDF reader from the options page. If this mode is enabled, the extension blocks the default action when a link with the PDF mime type is the target.
0.1.2:
It is possible to ask the extension to send the PDF URL to the external executable. Make sure your PDF Reader can open remote URLs before enabling this option
0.1.9:
You can now run the external executable with a delay. This helps your antivirus application to validate the PDF file before this extension opens it with the external PDF viewer.
Web Audio Recorder – Capture & Save MP3/WAV
Effortlessly record browser audio on any tab into high‑quality MP3 or WAV files—perfect for podcasts, lectures, music & more.

Web Audio Recorder — Your Ultimate Browser Audio Capture Tool

Quickly and effortlessly record browser audio from any tab directly into high-quality MP3 or WAV files — no external software needed. Perfect for creators who need a simple, privacy-focused way to capture streaming audio, internet radio, webinars, lectures, podcasts, and music.

🎙️ Perfect for:
▸ Podcasts & Interviews — record live shows or remote discussions directly from your browser.
▸ Lectures & Webinars — save online classes and training with a single click.
▸ Music & Streams — capture streaming audio, internet radio, or sound effects.
▸ Tutorials & Voice Notes — create voice memos, guides, and quick demos without exporting.

🔧 Key Features (what you can do):
▸ Tab audio capture — record audio from any active tab (system/browser audio).
▸ MP3 & WAV output — choose compressed MP3 (low/medium/high bitrate) or lossless WAV for highest fidelity.
▸ High-quality audio — control MP3 quality and preserve stereo channels when available.
▸ Custom duration — set a maximum recording time (e.g., 20 minutes).
▸ Mute tab while recording — automatically silence the recording tab for private sessions.
▸ Hotkeys — start/stop instantly with Shift + R / Shift + S.
▸ Local saving, no uploads — all files are saved locally; no server uploads, ensuring privacy and offline use.
▸ Lightweight & real-time — records in real time with minimal CPU usage and no delays.

🚀 How it works:

1.Install Web Audio Recorder from the Chrome Web Store.
2.Open the tab with the audio you want to capture.
3.Click Record or press Shift + R.
4.Stop with Shift + S and download your MP3 or WAV file.

⭐ Why choose Web Audio Recorder?
✅ Simple, intuitive interface for fast recording.
✅ Record streaming audio and save locally in MP3/WAV.
✅ High-quality, low-latency capture — suitable for podcasts and music.
✅ Privacy-focused: no ads, no sign-ups, 100% offline.
✅ Free to use and lightweight.

📌 Pro tips: use WAV for lossless archives and MP3 (high) for podcast publishing. For webinars or recordings where you need maximum clarity, enable the highest MP3 quality or choose WAV.

🌟 Start capturing audio from your browser — fast, private, and under your control.
Install Web Audio Recorder now and turn your browser into a powerful audio capture tool.

Send PDF (Portable Document Format) links to the Foxit™ Reader from right-click context menu or browser's action button

This extension simplifies the use of Foxit Reader to open PDF links.

How to Use:
1. Use the right-click context menu item to direct PDF links to Foxit PDF Reader.
2. Click the action button on PDF pages to transfer the PDF file to Foxit PDF Reader.
3. On the options page, customize the extension settings to open PDF links with Foxit Reader.

Notes:
1. Because Foxit Reader cannot directly open remote PDF links, this extension initially downloads the PDF file to your browser's default download directory and then activates the external PDF reader.
2. To establish communication with Foxit Reader, install a small native client specific to this extension. This client is compatible with Windows, Linux, and Mac operating systems. ChromeOS is not supported.
3. Ensure you have Foxit PDF Reader installed on your device. This extension only simplifies Foxit Reader integration with your browser and does not perform the installation.

--- Legal
Foxit Reader is a registered trademark of Foxit Software Incorporated, registered in the U.S. and other countries. This extension is an independent project and is not affiliated with Foxit Software. It serves as a tool designed to enhance the PDF reading experience.

⚠️ 주의
브라우저의 여러 제약으로 긴 영상의 녹화에 오류가 발생할 수 있습니다.

🧑‍💻 기여하기
Cheese-PIP는 오픈소스 프로젝트로, 누구나 개발에 참여할 수 있습니다.
아래 링크에서 Cheese-PIP의 소스를 확인하고, 여러분의 아이디어나 개선점을 기여해보세요.

https://github.com/khk4912/Cheese-PIP
Cheese-PIP는 네이버 치지직(chzzk)과 관련이 없는 개인 프로젝트입니다.
Save as GIF is a browser extension designed by Minh Anh Dang that allows you to save GIF images directly to your computer.

Extension Name: Save as GIF

Description:
Save as GIF is a handy browser extension that allows you to seamlessly save GIF images directly to your computer, automatically converting .webp images to .gif!!!

WARNING:
- Our extension CAN NOT work on GIPHY, https://7tv.app/ or GIFs with webp source.

Key Features:

- Format Preservation: Save GIFs with confidence, knowing that they will be preserved in their native GIF format.
- One-Click Saving: Streamlined functionality with a simple one-click saving process for quick and efficient GIF downloads.
- Browser Compatibility: Compatible with popular web browsers, providing a consistent experience across platforms.
- User-Friendly Interface: Intuitive and user-friendly interface for a hassle-free GIF saving experience.
- Privacy-Focused: Built with user privacy in mind, ensuring a secure and reliable extension.

How to Use:

1. Install the Save as GIF extension from the Chrome Web Store (or relevant extension store for your browser).
2. Browse the web and discover captivating GIFs.
3. Click on the GIF Saver icon in your browser toolbar when you find a GIF you'd like to save.
4. The saved GIF will be stored in a folder named "SaveAsGif" on your computer, usually in the Downloads directory.
5. The storage format is organized by date and page title for easy navigation: "SaveAsGIF/{Image Name}_{PageTitle}"

Thank you for your ongoing support and encouragement as we strive to enhance the "Save As gif" extension together. Please consider donating via my PayPal account: 
- Account Name: @MinhAnhDang1709 
- Email support: minhanhdang.forwork@gmail.com

[Update history]
13/5/2024 - Version 2.0: 
- Design pop-up items.
- Edit save folder setting: From 3 subfolders to 1 folder "Save as GIF"
- Edit file name setting: From {PageTitle} to {Image Name}_{PageTitle}

Features:
1. Instant streaming - You don't have to wait while the whole file loads. Webtor will start streaming from the first byte. You don't have to think where to download torrents and spend your hard drive space anymore.
2. Download everything as ZIP-archive - yes, you had share ability earlier as well, but now we have separate button. On click it will show dropdown with
all available social networks.
3. On-the-fly transcoding - Webtor automatically converts audio and video to the desired playback format suitable for your browser. Webtor supports video in AVI and MKV formats and lossless FLAC audio.

7. On a big screen - Webtor can cast video to your TV screen. TV box with Google Cast support required.

Secure Chrome using Trinetra Browser Security extension

Trinetra Browser Security extension is an advanced tool designed to help create a safe and secure browsing environment for users. It not only strengthens the security of your online activity but also ensures compliance with best practices in network security. Here's a more comprehensive description of its features:

Deploy Security Policies: Trinetra Browser Security enables organizations to deploy and enforce security policies that safeguard enterprise data and networks.

Improved Security through Compliance Tracking: The extension continuously monitors the compliance of your network with recommended security configurations, helping to maintain a robust defense against cyber threats.

Protection from Harmful URLs: It blocks malicious and harmful URLs, protecting users from potential phishing attacks, malware, and other online threats, allowing for a safer browsing experience.

Enhanced Privacy: Trinetra Browser Security automatically prompts websites to stop tracking your online activities and selling your personal data, ensuring greater privacy while surfing the web.

File Transfer Analysis: It analyzes file transfers to detect any potential risks, ensuring that files shared or downloaded from the internet do not contain malware or malicious content, thus securing your data.

Behavioral Analysis for User Security: The extension regularly reviews your browsing behavior to identify any unusual or potentially dangerous activity. It provides real-time alerts about suspicious behavior, helping users remain aware of potential threats.

Awareness of Malicious Activity: By continuously analyzing user activity and browsing patterns, the extension helps users stay vigilant and informed about malicious activity, empowering them to take timely actions to protect themselves.

Read aloud any Google Doc, PDF, webpage, or book with text to speech (TTS). Natural sounding voices in 30+ languages & 130 voices.

Read aloud with ElevenReader — the most natural text to speech (TTS) reader app powered by advanced AI audio. Whether you want to read books, PDFs, docs, news articles, or blogs, ElevenReader transforms any text into stunningly realistic voice narration. 

ElevenReader is your AI text reader — a Chrome web extension companion that reads to you with lifelike voice clarity. Perfect for saving web pages for later or importing web fiction books or homework assignments, it delivers a seamless “read to me” audio in 32+ languages. Powered by ElevenLabs’ cutting-edge TTS, it’s the highest-quality way to enjoy text in natural reader form.

What It’s Best For

ElevenReader is built for the stories and articles you actually want to read aloud — wherever you find them.

Perfect for Substack and Medium posts you want to listen to instead of skim. Ideal for web novels and fan fiction from sites like AO3, Royal Road, and FanFiction.net — even full series at once.

It also works seamlessly with news sites such as The Atlantic, Financial Times, and The Wall Street Journal — so you can save and read aloud from your logged-in subscription account anytime.

Using other extensions for downloading ePubs? ElevenReader will automatically import new ePub files compiled from other extensions for web books. 

How Does It Work?

Add the ElevenReader Chrome extension to your browser and turn any article, story, or webpage into something you can read aloud or listen to in seconds. Whenever you’re on a page you want to save, just click the extension icon — it’ll automatically add it to your ElevenReader account.

Hit “Listen now” to start an immersive, lifelike narration right away, or save it for later to enjoy on the go. If the extension detects a next chapter or additional pages, it lets you import the next chapter to keep reading entire web novels seamlessly.

Your saved reading instantly syncs across your iPhone, iPad, and Android devices for seamless, realistic voice narration anywhere, anytime.

What You Get 

        •        Read PDFs aloud — instantly listen to reports, study notes, and eBooks

        •        Bring books to life with expressive, natural-sounding voices

        •        Import ePubs compiled from other web extensions

        •        Control your pronunciations with a personal TTS dictionary

        •        Text highlighting that supports readers with dyslexia, ADHD, blind or learning needs

        •        Personalize playback — highlight text, bookmark, add notes, clip and share

        •        Flexible speeds from 0.25x to 3x with sleep timers for relaxed listening

        •        Global voices — choose from 32+ languages for a worldwide library

With ElevenReader, words aren’t just read — they’re performed. From studying PDFs to relaxing with books, this app transforms how you experience written content.

Users are selecting ElevenReader because it feels more natural than other read-aloud apps and offers a fresh alternative to pricey audiobook subscriptions.

Learn more:

Terms of Service: https://elevenreader.io/elevenreader-terms

Privacy Policy: https://elevenlabs.io/privacy
